ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot checking a clock, indicating the time of 5:30. The robot's left arm will rest at its side. The right arm will move to check a clock, starting from its side and moving to point at an imaginary clock face. Then, the arm will move back to its side. The animation should be smooth and deliberate, suggesting a careful check of the time.

frames.beat: both arms rest, waiting for the moment
right arm lifts to check the time, hand points outward
right arm lowers, the time is noted
